message:
feat(matrix): expand connector with sync, media, state, and room management operations

Extend the Matrix connector with additional capabilities:
- Room state event retrieval and modification
- Media upload/download support
- Sync endpoint integration for real-time event streaming
- Room membership and moderation operations
- Improved error handling aligned with the unified InvalidInput pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
